subject: Preparation for Upcoming Healthcare Conference
body:
Hi Michael,

I hope you are well. As we are preparing for the upcoming healthcare conference, I wanted to touch base on a few things. Could you please confirm your availability for a team meeting next week to discuss our participation strategy and promotional materials? I believe it's a great opportunity to showcase MediConn's services to a wider audience.

Additionally, we would also need your insights on the latest industry trends that we should highlight during our presentation.

Looking forward to your response.

Best,
Rachel

subject: Update on Q2 Financial Reporting
body:
Hi Rachel and James,

I wanted to provide a quick update on our Q2 financial reporting. The finance team is currently finalizing the details and we anticipate to have the report ready by the end of the month.

Once it's completed, we would need your input to discuss our budgeting and resource allocation plans for the next quarter. I will schedule a meeting closer to the time.

In the meantime, please let me know if you have any specific areas you would like us to focus on in the report.

Best,
Sarah

subject: Performance Review Schedule
body:
Hi Rachel,

As we approach the end of the first quarter, it's time to start planning for performance reviews. Could you please prepare a summary of the Customer Service Department's achievements and challenges over the past quarter? This will help us set the goals for the next quarter.

Also, please share your team's performance review schedule once it's finalized. I would like to join a few review meetings to give my feedback and appreciation to the team.

Best,
James

subject: Investigating 2022 Patient Experience Report Findings
body:
Hi Michael,

I've been analyzing the 2022 Patient Experience Report and noticed that a significant number of patients identified poor online booking tools and convoluted call centers as primary barriers to making appointments. As we strive to make our services more accessible, it's important we address these issues.

Could you provide some insights on how many of our corporate wellness clients have opted to renew their contracts with us? This could help us gauge if the booking or customer support issues are affecting our client retention.

Thanks,
Rachel

subject: Re: Investigating 2022 Patient Experience Report Findings
body:
Hi Rachel,

Great point. According to our records, we have achieved an 89% retention rate for corporate wellness clients, with 24 out of 27 corporate contracts renewed in 2024. This is a strong indication that our corporate clients are satisfied with our services overall.

However, we should still investigate these potential issues to ensure we maintain our high retention rate and improve the patient experience.

Best,
Michael

subject: Re: Investigating 2022 Patient Experience Report Findings
body:
Hi Michael,

Thanks for sharing those numbers. The high retention rate is encouraging, but you're right that we need to address any potential issues with our booking tools and customer support processes. I'll coordinate with the respective teams to identify and rectify any problems.

Best,
Rachel
